_comment: Copy to config.json and fill in. config.json is git-ignored.
_site_url_note: Your live domain. Used to build sitemap.xml, robots.txt and structured-data URLs.
_specs_api_base_note: Base URL of a phone-specs-api instance (self-host azharimm/phone-specs-api) or a licensed provider. Importer uses the /v2 endpoints.

llm._keys_note: Path to the env file holding the API keys. The agent reads the key matching the provider (e.g. GROQ_API_KEY).

affiliate._note: Partner tag / affiliate id are enough to generate monetized Buy links immediately (no API approval needed). PA-API access/secret keys are OPTIONAL and only used to fetch real live prices once your Associates account is approved.
